name: Puppetopia *
description: HERE’s festival of new puppetry returns for its third annual edition. Curated by HERE co-founder Barbara Busackino and Dream Music Artistic Director and puppeteer Basil Twist, the festival presents new, live and fully realized iterations of works and in-progress excerpts. *Recipient of a Jim Henson Foundation Presenter's Grant This is an annual festival.

name: International Puppet Fringe Festival
organizer: Teatro Sea and Groupo Morán (The Moran Group) with the support of The Clemente Soto Velez Cultural & Education Center
venue_name: The Clemente Soto Velez Cultural & Education Center
description: The International Puppet Fringe Festival, New York’s only international fringe festival dedicated to puppetry, returns August 12–16, 2026, bringing together acclaimed puppet artists, makers, and theater companies from around the world. This year's festival celebrates women in puppetry and features five days of performances, exhibitions, workshops, panel discussions, and film screenings. More than 50 productions and artists from a dozen countries will participate, showcasing the breadth and innov

name: Chicago International Puppet Theater Festival
description: The Chicago International Puppet Theater Festival is the largest event dedicated to the artform in the U.S.  In the heart of winter, the Festival spans 12 days and dozens of Chicago venues, sharing 100+puppetry activities with 14,000+ guests. The Festival includes performances, symposium, Catapult artist intensive, workshops, the Free Neighborhood Tour, and more.  Since its launch in 2015 by Festival Founder & Artistic Director Blair Thomas, the Festival has highlighted artists from nations incl

name: New Orleans Giant Puppet Festival
description: We support excellence in puppetry arts by presenting local, national and international artists selected for their diversity and ingenuity to the New Orleans Community and beyond. We imagine hope in the form of new stories through offering performance, education, and collaboration. Our Festival invites this prospect to the world.This festival is a 5 day celebration of the mysterious, ancient, and wildly varying art form of Puppetry. The Giant Puppet Fest hosts local, national, and international a

name: Minneapolis Puppetry Palate: A Taste of Puppetry
venue_name: Minneapolis Puppetry Palate: A Taste of Puppetry
description: A four-day festival of puppetry performances, workshops, studio tours, community-building and much, much more! This is a biennial festival.  The next festival is slated for 2026

name: Puppet Homecoming
organizer: Puppeteers of America Northeast and Mid-Atlantic Regional Puppet Festival
description: Puppet Homecoming will take place in downtown Ithaca NY - highlighting some of the best puppetry in the region as well as showcasing local puppet talent. We will invite workshop teachers from the region to teach workshops in the morning, and in the afternoons, we will have public shows with family friendly themes. There will be repeat performances to accommodate all festival goers and the local community. In the evenings, we will have adult puppet shows, a Slam, and a Potpourri event. The festiv

name: New York State Puppet Festival
description: Theatre@37 37 South Main St. Perry, NY newyorkstatepuppetfestival.org/ 501-350-6340

name: Puppets in Paradise
description: Sandglass Theater is pleased to announce the return of our most beloved community event. Puppets in Paradise brings together artists and audiences for a two-day celebration of puppetry and theater arts set in the beautiful agrarian landscape of Southern Vermont. This premier biennial family event is produced in collaboration with Retreat Farm, a prominent feature of the Brattleboro landscape for 180 years. At Puppets in Paradise audiences will walk around the farm and encounter short-form puppet

name: International Puppet Festival The Golden Dolphin
description: The International Puppet Festival the Golden Dolphin, established in 1972, is held once in every three years, from 1st to 7th October. The festival is intended to assist the development of Bulgarian dramaturgy for the puppet theatre, to popularize the achievements of Bulgarian puppet art, to introduce the modern trends of puppet art all over the world, and to contribute to closer contacts between the puppet and theatrical specialists from different countries. The festival looks forward to presen

name: International Puppet and Figure Festival: Arrivano Dal Mare!
description: The International Festival of Puppets and Figures: Arrivano Dal Mare! is one of the longest-running festivals entirely dedicated to puppetry in Italy and in the world. Established in Cervia in 1975, the festival has moved to the city of Ravenna and other localities in Romagna (mainly in the Forlì and Cesena areas). The ownership of the brand and the Artistic Direction of the Festival are, since 2015, the Teatro del Drago/Monticelli Art Family of Ravenna in collaboration with the host Municipalit

name: Summer Puppet Pier
description: Since 1990, the Maribor Puppet Theatre has been organizing the Summer Puppet Pier, an annual international summer festival in the city. Every year, in August, thousands of visitors enjoy an excellent program. Primarily, the festival offers the best foreign and domestic puppet performances for children, as well as performances for adults, workshops, exhibitions, installations, and other accompanying events. With the support of the Municipality of Maribor, Maribor puppeteers every year attract the

name: Show of Hands Puppet Festival
description: Join the artistic community at V+V to make, celebrate, and share the magic of puppetry in its vast forms! Workshops will be held at Visionaries and Voices, Cincinnati Art Museum, Contemporary Arts Center, Wave Pool, DSGNCllctv, PAR-Projects, WordPlay Cincy, Starting Sept 6th, a 6-week workshop series will culminate into spectacular performances happening Oct 11-14th; including the Show of Hands Puppet Slam, international puppetry workshop + performances, and a pageant parade! This is an annual f

name: Skirball Puppet Festival
description: During this fan-favorite festival, puppets of all shapes and sizes will be walking, soaring, and stomping about ready to meet you! See puppetry performances, dance to a live band, and make your own puppet friend to join in on the fun. Let your dreams run wild as you spend the day with friendly monsters, colorful animals, and eclectic creatures! Puppets of all shapes and sizes will delight and surprise as you move between performances by some of Southern California’s premier puppetry acts. Slide,

name: Galveston Loves Puppets
organizer: Puppeteers of America Southwest Regional Puppet Festival
description: Puppet shows and workshops at the Rosenberg Library in Galveston with free admission on Friday and Saturday.  Director: Leo Velasquez This is a biennial festival.  The next festival is slated for 2026

name: Puget Sound Puppetry Festival
description: We are excited to invite you to our 2024 edition scheduled to be held September 11th-14th in the historic Seattle neighborhood of Columbia City. The festival offers over multiple performances by local and visiting artists, creative workshops for all ages, a special Jim Henson: Life and Legacy Poster Exhibit, a puppet parade, Seattle Community Puppet Day, and multiple events ranging from the opening party, a special film screening, to a late-night puppet dance rave. This is an annual festival.

name: Festival Mondial des Theatres de Marionnettes
venue_name: Festival Mondial des Theatres de Marionnettes
description: Tickets on sale now The World Festival of Puppet Theatres, founded by Jacques Félix in 1961, has made Charleville-Mézières the capital of puppetry. The festival of Charleville-Mézières is the biggest regular meeting place of puppet theatres in the world. Since its creation, the most famous companies, the most talented solo artists have performed here; and other actor/puppeteers have become famous performing in front of an enthusiastic public. In a hugely festive atmosphere, hundreds of puppeteer

name: Festival international de Casteliers
venue_name: Maison internationale des arts de la marionnette (MIAM)
street_address: 30 avenue St-Just Montréal, QC, H2V 1X8 Canada
description: This annual event showcasing puppetry arts features remarkable creations from Québec, Canada, Spain, France, Belgium and Italy, to the delight of audiences both young and old!

name: The international figuren.theatre.festival
description: The international figuren.theatre.festival first took place in Erlangen in 1979. Nürnberg joined in 1981, followed by the city of Fürth in 1983 and finally Schwabach in 1989. From the very beginning, the festival has aimed to present contemporary puppet theatre and to encourage artistic encounters between different genres. Almost anything can act as a ‘Figur’ – puppets, objects and materials, the human body, video projections, machines, robots, artificial intelligence – even a beam of light, a s

name: Fresh Ideas in Puppetry Conference & Festival
description: Puppetmongers Studio Unit W-23 at 388 Carlaw Avenue Toronto, Canada puppetmongers.com/fresh-ideas-in-puppetry/

name: International Puppet Fringe Festival NYC
organizer: Teatro SEA, The Clemente & The Moran Group
venue_name: The Clemente Soto Velez Cultural & Educational Center
description: The International Puppet Fringe Festival NYC (also stylised as IPFFNYC or Puppet Fringe NYC) is a biennial puppet theater fringe festival hosted by Teatro SEA in the Lower East Side of New York City. The festival had its 1st edition in 2018, at the Clemente Soto Velez Cultural and Educational Center, and featured puppet shows, short films and artist talks with international puppet theater companies. The Puppet Fringe Festival is the first ever international fringe festival dedicated to puppetry.

name: Figur i Fossekleiva International Puppet Theater Festival
description: Figur i Fossekleiva (FiF), the International Festival of Puppetry and Visual Theatre was organized for the first time in 2016. From 2019, FiF also offers Research and Development (R&D) for companies from home and abroad throughout the year. There are several fierce performances for adults in this year's festival - check out Dis Order, Big boys don't cry and Antropophagic fables for fascist days - to name a few. As always at FiF, ALL children enter for free. At the family performances and childre

name: Puppets in the House
venue_name: Sugar River UMC, ART House 360, and Century School Park
description: Puppets in the House brings exceptional puppetry performance and education to south central Wisconsin. With intensive workshops and engaging shows, we share the wonder of puppets in their many forms, inspiring others to reach new heights in their own creative abilities. At this second annual festival in Verona, Wisconsin, we offer something for every level of interest and price point! For the professional or dedicated enthusiast: choose from one of four nine-hour workshop slots, starting on Frid

name: Newcastle Puppetry Festival
description: Moving Parts Arts brings North East of England people together through arts, celebration and creativity. Moving Parts Arts is an award winning arts and community development organization founded in 2017. Our week-long puppet festival, dynamic outreach projects and participatory community events engage up to 20,000 people a year. A belief that everyone can be creative is at the core of what we do and that puppetry is a unique way of bringing people together and breaking down barriers. Our work is

name: FIAMS | International Festival of Puppetry Arts in Saguenay
description: The FIAMS – International Festival of Puppetry Arts in Saguenay is: The only major theater event in Quebec to take place in the region; A festival of enviable national and international renown that stands out for the importance and quality of its programming, the richness of the exchanges it offers, without forgetting the warmth of its welcome; In-room programming ; Outdoor programming ; international digital programming; Popular happenings; 40  different shows of all shapes; more than 150 perfo

name: Melbourne Festival of Puppetry
description: We are delighted to welcome artists from across Australia to present their work. This year we are thrilled to offer audience’s 11 Children’s Performances, 3 adults performances, Roving Performances throughout the festival, Children’s Puppet Workshops and Professional Development Opportunities for Artists and Adults. New to this year’s festival is The Puppet Picnic, a FREE Community Day on the lawns of the Carlton Highrise Estate of performances, roving puppets, engaging workshops and an opportun

name: Harmony World Puppet Festival, Thailand
description: The Harmony Puppet Festival Project was launched in 2013 by the Semathai Marionette Arts for Social Foundation, with the approach of creating a space for learning the art of puppeteering at The Amphawa Chaipattananurak Conservation Project in the Amphawa District of Samut Songkram, Thailand. It created the current model of using regional identities to reach out to individuals who would otherwise have limited access to art.  In its first year, the project drew a lot of attention from internationa

name: International Puppet Theatre Festival named after Sergey Obraztsov
description: The International Puppet Theatre Festival named after Sergey Obraztsov  is held in Moscow. In the frame of the Festival Puppet shows for all age category will be presented in the Big, Small and Chamber Halls. This is a biennial festival. Last Festival was in 2025.

name: National Puppetry Festival
description: Produced by the national organization Puppeteers of America, the National Puppetry Festival is a multi-day event that hosts performances, workshops, panel discussions, and more! This is a biennial festival.

name: W.P. Puppet Power: Festival of Ideas
description: The Festival of Ideas Art Series conferences focus on applied puppetry - puppetry beyond performance - and explores the theory and practice of how puppetry arts promote positive social change. The conferences feature local, Canadian, and international master puppeteers presenting inspiring talks, practical how-to workshops, and/or puppetry-based performances. Panelists discuss intriguing ideas, peers mentor peers, and a community is created that calls for action on a different social issue theme

name: ANIMA IF Festival Internazionale di Teatro di Figura
description: Mornings dedicated to schools, afternoons for families and evenings for adults only. World-renowned artists, experts in the field of puppetry. Shadow theater, puppets, puppets, puppets and objects. This is an annual festival.

name: Incanti International Figure Theatre Festival
description: INCANTI is a festival dedicated to Puppet Theatre for adults, with particular emphasis on Shadow Theatre. The festival offers both traditional shows and productions which provide an international spectrum of innovative experimental work in which music, poetry and the visual arts intersect with fantasy and creative freedom. Incanti started in 1994 from an initiative of Controluce Teatro d’Ombre with the support of the Regione Piemonte and with the collaboration of Castello di Rivoli Museo d’Arte

name: Festival Internatiocional De Titeres Y Artes Vivas de Guadalajara
organizer: Festival Internacional de Títeres de Guadalajara
venue_name: Festín de los muñecos, Festival Internacional de Títeres de Guadalajara
description: The Feast of the Dolls, Guadalajara International Puppet Festival was  born in 2005 as an initiative of Luna Morena, an experimental puppet workshop. Originally it had the participation of mainly national companies; However, as of its second broadcast in 2006, the number of invited companies increased almost double, with a total of 12, including artists from Canada and Peru . In the third edition in 2007, thanks to the support of various sponsors, the Festival grew remarkably, having a total of

name: World Puppet Festival &  25th UNIMA Congress
organizer: UNIMA - Union Internationale de la Marionnette
description: The 24th edition of the UNIMA World Congress and the World Puppetry Festival will take place in Chuncheon, South Korea in 2025 This festival takes place every four years.

name: RIMA Festival, International Puppet Meetings
description: In October 2018, Ivoire Marionnettes organized the first edition of the International Puppet Meetings, bringing together artists from 9 different countries, 31 shows, a round table, and introductory workshops.  It has since become an annual festival. This is an annual festival.

name: International Shadow Theater Festival
description: Every three years, in October, Schwäbisch Gmünd becomes the "capital of shadow theatre": For a week, performers from all over the world show the fascinating technical and artistic possibilities that light and shadow art has to offer. Founded in 1988, the Schwäbisch Gmünd International Shadow Theater Festival is the oldest and only ongoing festival for contemporary shadow theater worldwide. Nowhere else is there a better opportunity for performers and audiences to experience the development of th

name: Internationale Puppentheatertage Mistelbach
description: Since the festival was founded, more than a quarter of a million spectators have been able to admire the finest international and national puppetry art from 63 countries around the world. On a total of seven festival days with 40 different productions from at least 10 different countries in around 90 performances, Mistelbach is all about puppetry every year - the cultural highlight for all generations in autumn in the Weinviertel, which also enjoys great international popularity and recognition.

name: International Puppets Festival
description: The International Puppets Festival takes place in Lugano, Switzerland. There are still some opportunities to participate (mainly shows for kids and families, in Italian, musical or with little text). This festival was created in 1979 by Michèle and Michel Poletti. It's still directed by Michel Poletti, along with Lucia Bassetti. For more information, contact: festival@palco.ch This is an annual festival. Next festival is slated for 2026.

name: Pesta Boneka
description: Pesta Boneka is an international biennale puppet festival initiated and hosted by Papermoon Puppet Theatre since 2008 in Yogyakarta-Indonesia. Papermoon Puppet Theatre has been well known as contemporary puppetry artists from Indonesiaa who present their works either in Indonesia, or in other countries. Not only attended by puppetry artists, PESTA BONEKA has been a place where people could see how puppets could be messengers who deliver message in many different forms, through many different cul

name: Titeremurcia
organizer: Artistic Directors: Angel Salcedo, Francisca Garcia, Maria Socorro Garcia, Carmen Navarro, Juan Manuel Quiñonero and Aniceto Roca
description: Titeremurcia, the International Festival of Puppet Theater in the Region of Murcia is an initiative of UNIMA Murcia, Murcia association based in Spain associated with UNIMA and UNIMA International Federation, the oldest international association of theater in the world dedicated to the art of puppetry and recognized by UNESCO. With an annual average of 10,000 spectators and the participation of 14 scenic areas, Titeremurcia has become one of the samples most interesting puppet theater Spanish So

name: International Festival of Puppetry and Animated Forms - FIMFA Lx
venue_name: International Festival of Puppetry and Animated Forms - FIMFA Lx
description: The International Festival of Puppetry and Animated Forms - FIMFA Lx is one of the most important festivals of puppetry and theatre in Portugal.  Running since 2001, the festival is organized and produced annually by the puppet company A Tarumba-Teatro de Marionetas. This is an annual festival.

name: Burattinarte d’Inverno
organizer: Artistic Directors: Consuelo Conterno and Claudio Giri
description: Great international show of puppetry that for over 20 years has been striving to spread the art of puppets, marionettes, shadows and puppets. This is an annual festival.

name: Festival de Casteliers
description: The Festival de Casteliers proposes outstanding works and new creations, selected to offer both adults and children present a panorama of the discipline and its different forms. This is an annual festival.

name: Puppet Festival Mississauga
description: The festival takes place all over the city of Mississauga. There are more than 15 events happening each year: puppet shows, films, workshops, exhibitions and talks. We carefully curate artists from around the world and across Canada to bring the best events for children to Mississauga.  Bridges Festival’s mission is to inspire and ignite imagination, sense of wonder, playfulness and creativity of children and adults alike. This is an annual festival.

name: Beverly Puppet Festival
organizer: Artistic Directors:  Anna Ingleby & Kerrin Tatman
description: Since 2005, Beverley Puppet Festival has welcomed thousands of audience members to experience the transformative, unique and inclusive world of puppetry. Puppetry is for everyone, not just children. Puppetry creates magic though mixing many artistic disciplines, drawing people of all ages and backgrounds into other worlds. We aim to bring out the adult within the child and the child within the adult, to spark creative and critical thinking, to think outside the box. This is a biennial festival.

name: Iida Puppet Festa
venue_name: Photo by: Sara Tanikawa, poster design
description: Iida Puppet Festa 5-5-1, Takaha-cho Iida, Nagano, 395-0051 Japan en.iida-puppet.com/

name: Internationaal micro Festival Dordrecht
description: During the International Micro festival the audience will see all sorts of little jewels of performances. There are traditional and experimental pieces. You will see a small overview in the area of visual art / object / puppet theater. This is an annual festival.

name: Andong Mask Dance Festival
organizer: Korea Foundation for Cultures and Ethics
description: The abundant cultural heritage of Andong is attributed to the worth-oriented philosophy of the Andong people who have coped with numerous social changes and positively adapted to new cultural traditions. Hence, various elements of Oriental culture have flowed into Andong and been re-synthesized into the distinctive Andong way of life and culture.  These socio-cultural, historical and religious heritages are the basis of the Maskdance Festival. We can learn quiet composure and mindfulness through

name: Puppet International
description: A puppetry festival held in the Netherlands. This is a biennial festival.  The next festival is slated for 2026

name: Puppets in the Green Mountains
description: Sandglass Theater announces its 12th Puppets in the Green Mountains (PGM) international festival, September 7th-15th, 2024. Local and international artists and community leaders bring to life this year’s theme: Just Around the Bend, which will investigate the relationship between evolving technologies and embodied knowledge through the dynamic artform of Puppet Theater. This year will include award-winning  performances from Germany, Spain, Canada, Puerto Rico, and across the USA, and a world pr

name: La MaMa Puppet Festival
description: In 1962, Ellen Stewart invited puppet artists from Korea to perform their production of Head Hunting by Pagoon Kang Wouk. This began La MaMa’s long love affair with all things puppetry. The form has been an integral part of La MaMa's artistic vision ever since. The La MaMa Puppet Series showcases new contemporary puppet theatre by American and international artists in all three of La MaMa's theaters. This is a biennial festival.

name: Guant - Festival Internacional de Teatre de Titelles de Valls
description: The techniques presented range from the traditional, with glove puppets and son, represented by televising the most 'muppets'. Diversity is a reality artistic and professional sector very own puppets very broad and complex, ranging from puppet shows aimed at younger children to more daring forms of entertainment for young people and adults. The is an annual festival.

name: International Pop Arts Festival
description: Pop Arts Festival is an initiative of Theater Bellevue, De Krakeling and Ostade A’dam and presents the latest in the field of puppetry and objecttheater from the Netherlands and abroad. This is an annual festival.  We hope this festival will return post-pandemic.

name: Chuncheon Puppet Festival
description: A puppetry festival held in South Korea.  The 35th Chuncheon Puppet Festival starts with a large-scale puppet parade, and then visits you as the largest puppet festival in Asia where high-quality domestic and foreign puppet shows and various cultural and art experience programs are held . This is an annual festival.

name: International Festival of Animated Objects
organizer: Artistic Director:  Xstine Cook & Peter Balkwill
description: As an incubator and producer of mask, puppetry, and  animated objects we are the primary curator and presenter of local,  national and international puppetry. We strive to provide Alberta  audiences with the chance to experience the breadth and diversity of  these innovative art forms. Vital to the development of puppetry as  an art form, the festival not only provides a stage for Alberta creators  to showcase their work but is also a forum for an international  exchange of ideas providing learn

name: PIF, Pupteatra Internacia Festivalo
description: To date PIF hosted more than 350 pupteatrojn from around the world who presented more than 450 different plays, several of whom were American. In the first PIF UDIs was obligatory to play presentations in Esperanto, but now theaters themselves choose the language in which they play. This is an annual festival, the next festival will take place in 2025.

name: Figuresco - Festival de Marionnettes pour enfants
organizer: Organized by the Puppet Theatre Workshop, The Turlutaine of La Chaux-de-Fonds, and UNIMA Switzerland
venue_name: Figuresco - Festival de Marionnettes pour enfants
description: FIGURESCO is a festival entirely dedicated to children puppets, organized each year by an amateur puppeteers company in collaboration with UNIMA * Switzerland . The festival aims to promote puppetry, which is often the first contact of a child with the theater. In addition, the protagonist puppet shows age-appropriate, enables identification of the child with the characters of the story.  By bringing together amateur puppet companies on both sides of the Sarine, the festival is a place of exchan

name: MimeLondon
organizer: created by Helen Lannaghan and Joseph Seelig
description: MimeLondon is a new curatorial project created by Helen Lannaghan and Joseph Seelig, the directors of London International Mime Festival (LIMF) which ended in 2023 after five decades of award-winning success. MimeLondon will support occasional collaborations of contemporary visual theatre in partnership with venues in London. Its first season takes place in Jan/Feb 2024 with 8 productions new to London.

name: Titirimundi
organizer: Directors:  July Michel and Marian de Palma
description: The festival promotes puppetry as an art form of traditional roots, which has adapted to the times without losing its popular origin, occupying a prominent place among the avant-garde theater. The puppet theater is now the core of contemporary creation.  Created in Segovia in spring 1985, Titirimundi has contributed to the emergence of an art movement of extraordinary creative fertility, also promoting knowledge and universal recognition of the puppet theater. This is an annual festival.  The ne

name: MANIPULATE Festival
description: MANIPULATE Visual Theatre Festival is produced by Puppet Animation Scotland. We champion visual theatre, puppetry and animation in Scotland. Through manipulate Visual Theatre Festival, we enable audiences and Scottish-based artists to see and engage with world-class visual theatre and animation. This is an annual festival.  The next festival is slated for 2025.

name: Skipton International Puppet Festival
organizer: Artistic Director:  Liz and Daniel Lempen
description: Since 2005 this cosy market town at the edge of the Yorkshire Dales has become a magnet for puppet enthusiasts. Our biennial celebration showcases puppetry from all over the UK and beyond. With weekends of ticketed and free performances, workshops, exhibitions and a parade, Skipton presents an inspirational melting pot for artists and enthusiasts, offering puppet experiences for every age. This is a biennial festival, the next festival is slated for 2025

name: Figuren Theater Festival Basel
organizer: Artistic Director:  Kathrin Doppler, Marius Kob
description: A puppetry festival held in Basel, Switzerland. This is a biennial festival.  The next festival is slated for 2025.

name: International Puppet Theatre Festival
description: 1977 State Puppet Theatre - Plovdiv initiated and organized the festival form - "International Review of miniature puppet", which in 1990 assumes the status of an international festival entitled "Two are small - three very" whose goal is to present to specialists and wide audience forum best achievements of the "small form" and be entered with his face in the European and world festival circuit. name: Fira de Teatre de Titelles de Lleida
organizer: Organized by: Puppet Centre and Lleida City Council
venue_name: fira de teatre de titelles de lleida
description: Fair market as puppet shows, theater of objects, masks, shadows and visual, is an annual event bringing together puppeteers, artists, programmers, and users festivals of culture and the world of performing arts. This is an annual festival.  The next festival is slated for 2025.

name: El Rinconcillo de Cristobica
description: The Festival of El Rinconcillo de Cristobica shows the work of different artists, that ways and very different aesthetic, explore various relationships between the manipulator and the manipulated object. García Lorca of Valderrubio each year, and has become an indisputable

name: Bábkarská Bystrica
description: The festival belongs to the prestigious cultural events in the Slovak puppet theater and professional theater of international importance. It is the largest festival of puppet theaters in Slovakia and began in 1977. This is a biennial festival.

name: Fidena International Puppetry Festival
description: The international festival "FIDENA - Puppet Theatre of Nations" is devoted to the art of puppet theater. Over half a century, this traditional festival has existed, has presented more than 1,000 performances of theater groups and artists from 47 countries. This is a biennial festival.  The next festival is slated for 2026.

name: marionNEttes - international festival
description: A puppetry festival held in Neuchâtel, Switzerland. This is a biennial festival.  The next festival is slated for 2026.

name: Figura Theaterfestival Baden
organizer: Production manager: Irène Howald, Artistic director: Eveline Gfeller
description: Since 1994, the Figura Theatre Festival presents biennial high-profile productions from home and abroad, including many Swiss premieres, in all theaters of Baden and Wettingen and on streets and squares ( "Figura fuori»). This festival is biennial.  The next festival will take place in 2026.

name: World Puppet Carnival
description: The World Puppet Carnival produces carnivals and festivals around the globe. Our events are seen in theaters, streets, cultural centers, parks, schools and hospitals. Puppeteers are inspired to share their art, culture and customs. We introduce children, families and adults to the magical Art of Puppetry. We fill children’s hearts with love for puppets as an alternative to video and electronic games. We help puppets become a child’s best friend. With fanfare, performances and a parade, we celebr

name: Festival Marionnettissimo
description: This is an annual festival.

name: Kukla Festivali
description: A puppetry festival held in Istanbul, Turkey. This is an annual festival.

name: Izmir International Puppet Days
description: This year's festival program will feature 27 puppet theater groups from 32 countries, 64 shows, and 275 performances in 45 showrooms. In the festival program, where an international symposium will take place, one will welcome 5 art exhibitors from Slovenia. Five professional stage performers will enrich the festival program with three workshops for children. Three conferences and an interview will expand our knowledge. There will be exciting hours in the puppet competition between elementary sch

name: Festival of Wonder - Silkeborg Dukketeaterfestival
description: Through the years many exceptional Danish and international theatre groups have performed at the Festival of Wonder - Silkeborg International Puppet Theatre Festival.  The festival has presented puppet, object and visual theatre for adults and for children. The organizer’s intention with international theatre is to invite performances which have not previously been shown in Denmark and which add something new and inspiring to the art form of puppetry for the audience as well as the participating

name: Borhnholm Puppet Festival
description: Bornholm Puppet Festival celebrates puppetry for children and adults alike.  Puppetry is visual theatre that transcends language with numerous types of expressions and forms such as glove puppets, marionettes, rod puppet, shadow puppets. Famed for its buzzing artist community Bornholm is a Danish island full of creative minded people. The picturesque island of Bornholm, also known as the "Sunshine Island", situated in the middle of the Baltic Sea is the setting of the Bornholm Puppet Festival. B
